description: Return a list of all Gps Positions.

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified IDs.

parameters.name: filters[created_by_id]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) created by the specified User IDs.

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

horizontal_accuracy.description: The horizontal radius of uncertainty for the location, measured in meters.

vertical_accuracy.description: The vertical radius of uncertainty for the location, measured in meters.

timestamp.description: The time at which this location was determined.

created_at.description: Date and time the gps position was created.

updated_at.description: Date and time the gps position was updated.
